title: The 2 Week Grind [Forge or Fabric]
description: A random mod pack made for me and my friends to play Minecraft for our yearly 2 week dose
body:
# The 2 Week Grind

Are you ready for your yearly 2-week Minecraft grind?

Look no further than this random mod pack made by a random guy on the internet with a handful of performance mods, the Create mod, Project E, and barely any more!

Honestly, this mod pack is just so my friends and I all have the same mods and I don't have to zip them up and send them around to make sure everything is compatible and working.

It also would allow me to update the modpack and everything still working on the server I am making.

Cheers ♥
